# Revenuxe

> AI-powered digital marketing and growth partner for startups and businesses.

Revenuxe helps brands grow with SEO, performance marketing, CRO, websites, and AI-enabled marketing operations.

## Company
- Name: Revenuxe
- Website: https://www.revenuxe.com
- Primary market: India with global delivery support
- Contact: https://www.revenuxe.com/contact

## Core Services
- SEO services: https://www.revenuxe.com/services/seo
- Performance marketing: https://www.revenuxe.com/services/performance-marketing
- Social media marketing: https://www.revenuxe.com/services/social-media
- Web development: https://www.revenuxe.com/services/web-development
- AI website services: https://www.revenuxe.com/services/ai-website
- AI web app development: https://www.revenuxe.com/services/ai-webapp

## Trust & Proof
- Case studies: https://www.revenuxe.com/case-studies
- Articles and insights: https://www.revenuxe.com/articles
- Projects: https://www.revenuxe.com/projects

## Useful URLs
- Home: https://www.revenuxe.com/
- About: https://www.revenuxe.com/about
- Contact: https://www.revenuxe.com/contact
- ROI calculator: https://www.revenuxe.com/roi-calculator
- Privacy: https://www.revenuxe.com/privacy
- Terms: https://www.revenuxe.com/terms

## Crawling Guidance
- Public marketing pages may be indexed and summarized.
- Admin/auth routes are excluded in robots policy.
- Canonical source of truth for URLs is the XML sitemap.
